name: evidence_synthesis
instructions: Synthesize across ALL provided articles. Note disagreements between studies.

fields.name: n_studies
fields.description: Number of distinct primary studies across the provided articles.

fields.name: common_intervention
fields.description: Intervention or exposure shared across the articles, if any.

fields.name: pooled_findings
fields.description: High-level synthesis of what the body of evidence shows.

fields.name: points_of_disagreement
fields.description: Specific points where the articles disagree or report inconsistent results.

fields.name: evidence_gaps
fields.description: Open questions or populations not covered by the provided articles.
